body: plane showed up with a cracked front knob and the box corner was smashed. order 4471822
Sorry to hear that, Jordan. Could you send a couple photos of the cracked knob and the packaging so we can file the damage claim?
sent 3 pics. crack runs right through the base of the knob
Thanks, that's clearly shipping damage. We'll ship a replacement No. 60-1/2 at no charge and email a prepaid label for the damaged one. Marking this solved once it's on the way.
appreciate it, thanks
replacement got here but the sole has a ding on the leading edge, wont sit flat on the stone

That's not acceptable for a Lie-Nielsen, I'm sorry. I've flagged this order so the next one gets a hand-inspection before it ships. Can you confirm the shipping address on file is still 418 East Jones Street?
yeah same address. raleigh 27601
Internal note: second unit inspected by fulfillment lead before shipment, tracking confirmed. Refunded shipping on original order as a goodwill credit.
third one is perfect, tuned it up last night. thanks for sorting it out
where do i send the busted plane back, and i dont want to pay shipping on it
No cost to you. I've emailed a prepaid return label to jordan.mcdaniel@gmail.com. Just drop it at any carrier location in the original box if you still have it.
got it, dropping it off tomorrow
ordered a no 4 bench plane on the 10th, still shows processing. anything holding it up
Thanks for checking in, Jordan. The No. 4 is on a short backorder from Lie-Nielsen, expected to ship to us within the week. I'll update you the moment it moves.
ordered the narex 6 piece bench chisel set, box only had 4. order 4468190
Sorry about that, Jordan. The full 6-piece set is on its way and you can keep the 4 you received. No need to return anything. Tracking will hit your email shortly.
separator lid came cracked at the flange, cant get a seal on the shop vac
That's a shipping crack, we'll send a replacement lid out today with a bit more padding. Sorry for the hassle. Marking solved once it ships.
tracking on 4482611 still says pre shipment a week later. did it actually go out
